Purpose: Provide a durable visual of financial accountability, operations, committee oversight, and congregational authority.. Current status: Needs Bylaw Review. Related committee/body: Congregation, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Does the diagram match the bylaws and adopted reporting relationships?. File name: docs/governance/finance-committee-charter.md. Type of document: Committee charter. Purpose: Define Finance Committee purpose, responsibilities, meeting cadence, monthly review, software ownership, and reporting.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Does this match KBC bylaws and current committee authority?. File name: docs/governance/personnel-committee-role.md. Type of document: Committee role clarification. Purpose: Clarify Personnel Committee role in finance-related staffing, job descriptions, accountability, and evaluations.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Should this live in a broader personnel manual instead of the financial operations manual?. File name: docs/governance/responsibility-matrix.md. Type of document: Responsibility matrix. Purpose: Show which committee/body owns which finance operations decisions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Deacons, Pastor, Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Congregation. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Which cells require bylaw confirmation or church practice confirmation?. File name: docs/governance/future-governance-expansion.md. Type of document: Parking lot / governance review note. Purpose: Preserve future review questions for Benevolence, other committee spending, Deacon counsel, and congregational approval paths.. Current status: Parking Lot. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee, Congregation if required. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Which future issues should wait until Bookkeeper hiring and immediate financial controls are stable?. File name: docs/roles/treasurer-governance-role.md. Type of document: Role description. Purpose: Draft the elected Treasurer / Financial Officer role focused on governance, accountability, reporting, and Finance Committee coordination.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Treasurer, Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Congregation. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Should day-to-day bookkeeping be optional, interim-only, or removed from this role?. File name: docs/roles/bookkeeper-financial-administrator-job-description.md. Type of document: Job description. Purpose: Draft operational paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator duties, qualifications, software responsibilities, and accountability.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: What compensation, hours, classification, supervision, and Finance Committee duty/control input are needed before hiring?. File name: docs/roles/bookkeeper-hiring-process.md. Type of document: Hiring process / checklist. Purpose: Provide hiring checklist, interview guide, reference questions, and candidate evaluation rubric for the authorized paid Bookkeeper role.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: Who will serve as hiring lead, interview coordinator, reference checker, and Finance workflow reviewer?. File name: docs/roles/bookkeeper-job-application.md. Type of document: Job application. Purpose: Provide a draft application for a Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator in the style of existing KBC forms.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Handbook: No. Open questions: What final application language and background-check requirements are needed?. File name: docs/roles/interim-treasurer-role.md. Type of document: Interim role description. Purpose: Define temporary coverage expectations while Treasurer role is vacant or transitioning.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Deacons, Congregation. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: What is the term, authority, and reporting path for the interim Treasurer?. File name: docs/roles/treasurer-vs-bookkeeper-duty-split.md. Type of document: Duty split analysis.
